meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Build a Portfolio for Students
content.seo_description: Overcome the no-portfolio barrier. Learn how to perform a Claude Code skills setup using Antigravity to build high-impact projects as a student developer.
content.answer_block: To overcome the no-portfolio gap, leverage Claude Code to accelerate your development workflow. By integrating Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding, you can transform complex ideas into deployable, production-ready code. This streamlined setup allows you to build sophisticated SaaS features, proving your technical competence to future employers through tangible, live results.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a new repository is the student developer's greatest adversary. You have the theoretical knowledge, but without a portfolio, you are invisible to recruiters. The industry doesn't care about your GPA; it cares about what you can ship under pressure.

This guide is your tactical roadmap to breaking that cycle. By mastering Claude Code and Antigravity, you are moving beyond simple tutorials and into the realm of professional engineering. We aren't just writing code; we are building a verifiable track record of technical excellence that commands attention.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a clean workspace where Claude Code can interact with your local directory to manage dependencies and version control.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a professional TypeScript project structure, including ESLint, Prettier, and a robust folder architecture for a SaaS application.

steps.title: Architecting the Database Schema
steps.description: Use AI to design a relational database model that follows industry standards, ensuring your portfolio project demonstrates architectural foresight.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a Prisma schema for a user authentication and task management system, ensuring proper relational integrity and indexing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema with relational models'

steps.title: Implementing API Endpoints
steps.description: Accelerate backend development by generating type-safe API routes that handle requests, validation, and error logging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an Express router for project resource management with full CRUD operations and Zod validation.

steps.title: Frontend Component Integration
steps.description: Bridge the gap between your API and the user interface using component-driven development patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a reusable React dashboard component that fetches data from the API and handles loading and error states.

steps.title: Deployment and Documentation
steps.description: Finalize your project with production-ready configuration and a comprehensive README that highlights your technical decisions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a professional README.md that details the architecture, technical stack, and how to run the project locally.

pro_tips: Always use atomic commits when Claude Code generates code so you can revert granular changes if a feature breaks.
Force Claude Code to explain its architectural decisions by adding '--explain' to your command arguments.
Use Antigravity to generate unit tests for every new feature; a portfolio project with 80%+ test coverage stands out significantly to senior reviewers.
Inject your own 'human' logic into the generated code; AI-only code often lacks specific edge-case handling that interviewers look for.
Keep your Claude Code session scoped to specific tasks to prevent the AI from losing track of the project's global state.
content.next_steps: Once you have completed your first module, push your code to GitHub, write a brief blog post explaining one technical challenge you overcame, and link it to your LinkedIn profile.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to build what others are only dreaming of. Stop waiting for permission to be a developer and start shipping. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
